title: WATCH:  Americans scramble to leave Middle East amid strikes
fullText: Americans scramble to leave Middle East amid strikesThe fighting in the region is leaving thousands of Americans there uncertain about their situation. ABC News' Chief International Correspondent James Longman reports from Turkey.March 1, 2026
summary: The fighting in the region is leaving thousands of Americans there uncertain about their situation. ABC News' Chief International Correspondent James Longman reports from Turkey.
